parameters.query: SELECT id, name, keywords, location_insee, location_label, latitude, longitude, rome_codes, radius_km, contract_types, seniority, must_have, exclusions, score_threshold FROM search_profiles WHERE active = true ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO companies (name, website, sector, last_updated) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, now()) ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET website = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.website, ''), companies.website), sector = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.sector, ''), companies.sector), last_updated = now() RETURNING name, sector, website;
UPDATE offers SET score = $1, score_reason = $2 WHERE hash = $3 RETURNING *;

meta.note: 01 multi-profils — sources retenues : France Travail (officiel, géoloc INSEE+rayon) + JobSpy (LinkedIn/Indeed FR/Glassdoor) + La Bonne Alternance (offres alternance + recruteurs spontanés). Adzuna/SerpApi/JSearch/WTTJ retirés (doublons/obsolètes). Boucle profils -> 3 collectes -> Merge(3) -> score -> hash -> INSERT (dédup, RETURNING only-new) -> affinage DeepSeek -> seuil -> Discord alerts ; LBA recruteurs -> upsert companies + Discord candidature spontanée. credentials Postgres = pgjobhunter0001.
